hooks.command: file="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}"; case "$file" in */CLAUDE.md|*/AGENTS.md|*/OPENCODE.md) echo 'SYNC REQUIRED: You just edited a synced file. CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and OPENCODE.md must be identical. Update the other two files now.';; esac; exit 0
